case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS HENDERSON RALPH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $180.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT HENDERSON RALPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HENDERSON RALPH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDERSON RALPH $180.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $221.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HENDERSON RALPH
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $246.82 AS TO DEFENDANT HENDERSON RALPH
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HENDERSON RALPH
